string.text: The Welrod MK.2, now chambered in .45 ACP, retains its iconic integrally suppressed design and compact profile, offering a discreet and effective firearm for specialized operations. The .45 ACP variant enhances the pistol's stopping power, making it even more suitable for close-range engagements. The pistol's simplicity, reliability, and near-silent operation make it an ideal choice for clandestine missions where stealth and precision are paramount. \n \n
Magazine made for the Welrod MK.2 Pistol, doubling as a handle. Holds 6 rounds of .45 ACP ammunition. \n \n
